name: SHAPE elamipretide healthy-aging pilot
summary: A recruiting open-label, single-arm phase 2a pilot testing four weeks of daily subcutaneous elamipretide for safety, tolerability, inflammation markers, mobility, cognition, and skeletal-muscle strength in adults aged 65 to 80.
population: Adults aged 65 to 80 with lower function and VO2peak thresholds used as evidence of lower mitochondrial function
